name: sword
description: A plain iron blade. Heavy enough to bludgeon a goblin with if thrown.

name: rapier
description: A well-made blade, expertly balanced.

name: katana
description: A well-made blade, expertly balanced.

name: round shield
description: A round wooden shield. Blocks blows, but too light to bruise anyone.

name: kite shield
description: A sturdy kite shield offering good protection.

name: torch
description: A blazing torch that casts bright light all around.

name: chain mail
description: Mail made of rings.

name: scale mail
description: Overlapping iron scales on a leather backing. Painful to be hit by.

name: dagger
description: A short bladed dagger. Quicker to wield than a sword but less punishing on a hit.

name: punch dagger
description: A fine dagger capable of slicing a foe to ribbons.

name: amulet of nimbleness
description: A complex magical token that helps you move faster.

name: amulet of finesse
description: An intricate sign traced in silver, it seems to aid your precision in combat.

name: amulet of light
description: A pale gem on a leather cord. Sheds a wide radius of soft light.

name: fire bomb
description: A flask of unstable alchemy. On impact, deals damage and ignites tiles around the target.

name: blast bomb
description: A heavy iron sphere that detonates concussively, hurting everything around the impact point.

name: freeze bomb
description: A frosted vial that shatters into a freezing burst â€” chills nearby creatures and douses any flames.

name: oil bomb
description: A glass sphere of dark oil. Shatters and slicks the floor on impact.

name: healing potion
description: A vial of bluish elixir. Drinking it knits wounds gradually over the next several turns.

name: power orb
description: A glowing magical sphere. Absorbing it grants you a perk point.

name: wand of water
description: A pale blue wand. Pools water on the target tile.

name: wand of oil
description: A dark wand slick to the touch. Slicks oil onto the target tile.

name: wand of vegetation
description: A green wand bound with vine. Sprouts grass and trees at the target.

name: wand of fungus
description: A spongy red-brown wand. Coaxes mushrooms up from the target.

name: wand of fire
description: A blackened wand crackling with embers. Ignites the target.

name: wand of dog
description: A wand carved from antler. On a zap, summons a loyal dog beside you.

name: wand of detonation
description: A blackened iron wand inlaid with red runes. Detonates the target tile in a ball of fire.

name: wand of magic missile
description: A short wand topped with a pale chip. Fires a magic missile.

name: wand of banishment
description: A wand bound in tarnished silver. A bright beam of light leaves a banished ghost as a wisp of memory.

name: wand of lightning
description: A wand that crackles with energy.  Bad news to those who are conductive.

name: pear
description: A ripe green pear. Juicy enough to take the edge off a hungry belly.

name: delicious fish
description: A small fresh fish. So tasty that a stray cat or dog hit by it will follow you for the rest of its life.

name: scrumptious pear
description: A specially ripe pear, dripping with juice. Five times more filling than the ordinary kind.

name: silvery pear
description: A pear with skin that shimmers like polished silver. Mysterious.

name: conference pear
description: A long elegant pear, reportedly the kind eaten at high meetings.

name: potion of sorcery
description: A glittering blue brew. Empowers every wand the drinker carries.

name: potion of ghostliness
description: A swirling pearl-grey liquid. The drinker temporarily becomes ethereal â€” flies and slips through walls.

name: potion of invisibility
description: A clear potion that hides the imbiber from sight for a short while.

name: potion of poison
description: A sickly green elixir. Vile to drink, devastating to throw.

name: potion of insight
description: A clear potion that crackles faintly. Reveals the layout of the entire level on a draught.
